name: White Mirror Journal
subtitle: 90 Days of Self-Reflection
description: White Mirror is a premium 90-day self-reflection journal and companion app. Through the M.I.R.R.O.R. method, daily prompts, and pattern insights, it guides you toward deeper self-awareness — one day at a time.

versions.localizedDescription: White Mirror is a 90-day self-reflection companion built around the M.I.R.R.O.R. method — Moment, Identify, Reflect, Reframe, Observe, Rise. Each day brings a guided prompt rooted in psychology, helping you build self-awareness, break patterns, and grow with intention. Pair it with your physical White Mirror journal for the full experience.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: White Mirror needs access to your photos to personalize your reflection experience.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: White Mirror needs camera access to scan your journal's QR codes.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: White Mirror needs microphone access for voice reflection entries.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: White Mirror may use your location to provide context-aware reflection insights.
